name: arsonkupik
description: Privacy-first professional browser audio enhancer built on the Web Audio API.

scripts.check: node scripts/check_repository_identity.mjs && node scripts/check_release_metadata.mjs && node scripts/run-python.mjs scripts/validate.py && node scripts/smoke_privacy.mjs && node scripts/smoke_support.mjs && node scripts/smoke_stability.mjs && node scripts/smoke_headless.mjs && node scripts/smoke_update_queue.mjs && node scripts/smoke_global_state_queue.mjs && node scripts/smoke_runtime_startup.mjs && node scripts/smoke_audio_route.mjs && node scripts/smoke_support_prompt.mjs && node scripts/smoke_signature_presets.mjs && node scripts/smoke_i18n.mjs
scripts.release:check: node scripts/check_repository_identity.mjs && node scripts/check_release_metadata.mjs && node scripts/run-python.mjs scripts/validate.py --release && node scripts/smoke_privacy.mjs && node scripts/smoke_support.mjs && node scripts/smoke_stability.mjs && node scripts/smoke_headless.mjs && node scripts/smoke_update_queue.mjs && node scripts/smoke_global_state_queue.mjs && node scripts/smoke_runtime_startup.mjs && node scripts/smoke_audio_route.mjs && node scripts/smoke_support_prompt.mjs && node scripts/smoke_signature_presets.mjs && node scripts/smoke_i18n.mjs
